title: The Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006
full_text: The Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006 अनुसूचित जनजाति और अन्य परंपरागत वन निवासी (वन अधिकारों की मान्यता) अधिनियम, 2006 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200702 Act Number: 02 Enactment Date: 2006-12-29 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006 Hindi Title: अनुसूचित जनजाति और अन्य परंपरागत वन निवासी (वन अधिकारों की मान्यता) अधिनियम, 2006 Long Title: An Act to recognise and vest the forest rights and occupation in forest land in forest dwelling Scheduled Tribes and other traditional forest dwellers who have been residing in such forests for generations but whose rights could not be recorded; to provide for a framework for recording the forest rights so vested and the nature of evidence required for such recognition and vesting in respect of forest land. Ministry: Ministry of Tribal Affairs Enforcement Date: 31-12-2007 Notification: 31st December, 2007, vide notification No. S. O. 2224(E), dated 31st December, 2007, see Gazette of India Extraordinary, Part II, sec 3(ii). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Scheduled Tribes and Other Traditional Forest Dwellers (Recognition of Forest Rights) Act, 2006 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II FOREST RIGHTS CHAPTER III RECOGNITION, RESTORATION AND VESTING OF FOREST RIGHTS AND RELATED MATTERS CHAPTER IV AUTHORITIES AND PROCEDURE FOR VESTING OF FOREST RIGHTS CHAPTER V OFFENCES AND PENALTIES CHAPTER VI MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Forest rights of Forest dwelling Scheduled Tribes and other tradional forest dwellers. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Recognition of, and vesting of, forest rights in forest dwelling Scheduled Tribes and other traditional forest dwellers. Section 5. Duties of holders of forest rights. Section 6. Authorities to vest forest rights in forest dwelling Scheduled Tribes and other traditional forest dwellers and procedure thereof. Section 7. Offences by members or officers of authorities and Committees under this Act. Section 8. Cognizance of offences. Section 9. Members of authorities, etc., to be public servants. Section 10. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 11. Nodal agency. Section 12. Power of Central Government to issue directions. Section 13. Act not in derogation of any other law. Section 14. Power to make rules.
